revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Systems of measurement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Systems of measurement/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Systems of measurement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Systems of measurement/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Systems of measurement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Systems of measurement/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === The default spelling is "metre" and "Geometrised". *For [[Oxford spelling]], i.e. "metre" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|oxford}}. *For US spelling, i.e. "meter" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|us}}.
=== See also === *{{Tl|Systems science}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Physical quantities and unit navigational boxes]] [[Category:Measurement navigational boxes]] }}</includeonly>

=== Usage === The default spelling is "metre" and "Geometrised". *For [[:en:Oxford spelling|Oxford spelling]], i.e. "metre" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|oxford}}. *For US spelling, i.e. "meter" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|us}}.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === The default spelling is "metre" and "Geometrised". *For [[:en:Oxford spelling|Oxford spelling]], i.e. "metre" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|oxford}}. *For US spelling, i.e. "meter" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|us}}.

=== Usage === The default spelling is "metre" and "Geometrised". *For [[:en:Oxford spelling|Oxford spelling]], i.e. "metre" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|oxford}}. *For US spelling, i.e. "meter" and "Geometrized", use {{para|sp|us}}.
